title: Quick Sort

content: python def partition(array, begin, end): pivot = begin for i in range(begin+1, end+1): if array[i] <= array[begin]: pivot += 1 array[i], array[pivot] = array[pivot], array[i] array[pivot], array[begin] = array[begin], array[pivot] return pivot def quicksort(array, begin=0, end=None): if end is None: end = len(array) - 1 def _quicksort(array, begin, end): if begin >= end: return pivot = partition(array, begin, end) _quicksort(array, begin, pivot-1) _quicksort(array, pivot+1, end) return _quicksort(array, begin, end)
title: Quick Sort

content: something Why not support earlier versions of Hugo? Since Markdown Render Hooks was introduced in the Hugo Christmas Edition, this theme only supports Hugo versions above 0.62.0. Hugo extended version is recommended Since some features of this theme need to processes  SCSS to  CSS, it is recommended to use Hugo extended version for better experience.
